title: Pudhu Vellai Mazhai Lyrics Roja
stanzas:
[Pudhu vellai mazhai
ingu pozhiginradhu
indha kollai nilaa
udal nanaikindradhu

ingu sollaatha idamkooda
kulirkindradhu
manam soodaana idam
thaedi alaikindradhu] (2)

nadhiye nee aanaal
karai naan.
siru paravai nee aanaal
un vaanam naanae.

Pudhu vellai mazhai
ingu pozhiginradhu
indha kollai nilaa
udal nanaikindradhu

penn illaadha oorile
adi aan poo ketpathillai.
penn illaadha oorile
kodithaan poo poopathillai.

un pudavai mundhaanai
saaindhadhil indha
boomi poo poothadhu.

idhu kamban paadaatha
sindhanai undhan kaadhodu
yaar sonnadhu.

Pudhu vellai mazhai
ingu pozhiginradhu
indha kollai nilaa
udal nanaikindradhu

ingu sollaatha idamkooda
kulirkindradhu
manam soodaana idam
thaedi alaikindradhu

Pudhu vellai mazhai
ingu pozhiginradhu
indha kollai nilaa
udal nanaikindradhu

Nee anaikindra velai
uyir poo dhidukendru malarum.
nee vedukendru oadinaalum
uyir poo sarugaaga ularum.

Pudhu vellai mazhai
ingu pozhiginradhu
indha kollai nilaa
udal nanaikindradhu

ingu sollaatha idamkooda
kulirkindradhu
manam soodaana idam
thaedi alaikindradhu

nadhiye nee aanaal
karai naan.
siru paravai nee aanaal
un vaanam naanae.

Pudhu vellai mazhai
ingu pozhiginradhu
indha kollai nilaa
udal nanaikindradhu(2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Pudhu Vellai Mazhai conveys feelings of love and nostalgia, depicting the beauty of romantic moments.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Roja, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the protagonists' deep emotional connection.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the melodious voices of Sujatha Mohan and Unni Menon.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Pudhu Vellai Mazhai was composed by the legendary AR Rahman.

When was the song released?

Pudhu Vellai Mazhai was released on August 14, 1992.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pudhu Vellai Mazhai, the protagonists express their love through poetic imagery and heartfelt emotions. The song beautifully captures the essence of romance, with its soothing melody and enchanting lyrics. It evokes a sense of nostalgia, making it a perfect backdrop for intimate moments in the film Roja. The collaboration of Sujatha Mohan and Unni Menon, under the masterful direction of AR Rahman, creates a timeless classic that resonates with audiences even today.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pudhu Vellai Mazhai from Roja is a timeless romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Sujatha Mohan and Unni Menon, paired with AR Rahman's mesmerizing composition, this song transports listeners to a world of serene emotions. Experience the magic of this classic that continues to resonate with hearts across generations.
stanzaMeanings: The new white rain is falling here, this beautiful moonlight is reflecting on the body.
This place, which cannot be described, is filled with a coolness that the heart seeks.
If you are the river, I am the shore. If you are the small bird, I am your sky.
The new white rain is falling here, this beautiful moonlight is reflecting on the body.
In a place without women, there are no flowers to be picked. In a place without women, flowers do not bloom.
Your dress has brought flowers to this earth.
This is a thought that cannot be sung by Kamban; who has said it with your love?
The new white rain is falling here, this beautiful moonlight is reflecting on the body.
This place, which cannot be described, is filled with a coolness that the heart seeks.
The new white rain is falling here, this beautiful moonlight is reflecting on the body.
You, who do everything, are like a flower that blooms and withers. Even if you want to go, the flower will still bloom.
The purity that cannot be taken away by two hands is danced by your eyes.
The moon that does not blend with the flower's fragrance has come to me.
The new white rain is falling here, this beautiful moonlight is reflecting on the body.
This place, which cannot be described, is filled with a coolness that the heart seeks.
If you are the river, I am the shore. If you are the small bird, I am your sky.
The new white rain is falling here, this beautiful moonlight is reflecting on the body.
